title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Ecom Express - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Ecom Express - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Ecom Express invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ecom Express:
Ecom Express is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express!
